metadata.description: Integration test suite for KB query engine with 10 sample customer questions
metadata.test_scope: All brands (SPA, AES, SLIM) + cross-brand queries
metadata.notes: Relevance thresholds calibrated to KB query engine scoring algorithm (keyword overlap + text similarity + tier weighting)
